title: Fast Eating By Juix
description: Datapack for eating faster, forget that annoying animation
body:
# ℹ️ Fast Eating By Juix The Fast Eating pack allows you to reduce the duration of the eating animation, as you may find it boring, for your survival adventures. (0.8s animation time by default) (for simple food items only, not golden apples for example)

![Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c09cd0c617f22b6299e67434952ac76bc5f3ce7.webp) # 🆕 Options - **_/function datapack:fast_eating_datapack/change_eating_speed_** | To reduce/change eating animation time (÷2, ÷4, or Instant consumption !)
# 🪳 Known issues - Does not work with modded food or special food (like golden apples) - Bad compatibility with Magnets mods : when you obtain a food item you already have, it may create a new stack. Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
